content:
MODULE: cosmos.integration.chain_memory.startup
FILE: cosmos/integration/chain_memory/startup.py (506 lines)
CATEGORY: integration

DESCRIPTION: Chain Memory Startup - Prompt users to load chain memories on launch.

When enabled, this prompts users at startup to either:
1. Enter TX IDs manually
2. Load all memories from their wallet address
3. Skip and start fresh

PUBLIC FUNCTIONS:
- def prompt_memory_load(bot_type: str='cosmos', auto_detect_wallet: bool=True) -> Optional[List[str]]
- async def auto_load_memories(tx_ids_or_wallet: List[str], bot_type: str='cosmos', memory_path: Optional[str]=None, on_pr
- def main()
